title: GT vs MI prediction: Who’ll win, Gujarat or Mumbai? We asked ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; the verdict is unanimous
content:
The article offers a prediction for the upcoming GT vs MI (Gujarat Titans vs Mumbai Indians) cricket match.
*   It consulted three different AI models – ChatGPT, Gemini, and Grok – for their winner predictions.
*   All three AI models delivered a unanimous verdict on which team will win the match.
